Support is slow

Four-day reply windows on what should be one-hour issues. Tickets escalated to "engineering" just sit there.
tp-user-a April 9, 2026 8

Sign-up was great, billing was not

Onboarding flow looked premium; canceling forced me to call a sales line during business hours. Bait-and-switch.
